description: Strings of Greek/Coptic numerals. It is possible that these are intended to spell out words (other documents are known that use Coptic numerals as an alphabetic cipher) but it may simply be sums for accounting. Needs further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
